TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Roosevelt Skerrit ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 6, Roosevelt Skerrit, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1972) mrhuw Dominica ta' misuw hya' ga Roosevelt Skerrit, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2004 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Xiao Zhan minkahul Roseau na Dominica. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1972 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: roos~…ēe*elt s~…ēkerrit rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, roos~…ēe*elt s~…ēkerrit, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw *omini ¶~ ®a ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a roos~…ēe*elt s~…ēkerrit, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral xiao zńßan minkańßul ros~…ēeau na *omini ¶~ ®a. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
S.FORM: Roosevelt Skerrit ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 6, Roosevelt Skerrit, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1972) mrhuw Dominica ta' misuw hya' ga Roosevelt Skerrit, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2004 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Xiao Zhan minkahul Roseau na Dominica. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1972 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw *omini ¶~ ®a ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a roos~…ēe*elt s~…ēkerrit, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral xiao zńßan minkańßul ros~…ēeau na *omini ¶~ ®a. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
